segments.text: Morning on my face, dust on my shoes. I left the old road
Pocket full of sparks, heart in drive. I've been waiting on this
Every little break leads me back again. Open sky tonight,
I'm running to my dreams. Open sky tonight,
nothing's as it seems. I'm free, I'm free. Watch me rise again. Open sky tonight, I'm moving forward.
underneath my fear. Took the long way out,

but I made it here. Every scar I wore turned into gold. Now I'm stepping light with a story to hold. I can feel it now. I can feel it now. Pulling in my chest. Pulling in my chest. Every little loss made me ready for the next. Open sky tonight,
I'm running to my dreams. Open sky tonight,

nothing's as it seems. I'm free, I'm free. Watch me rise again. Open sky tonight, I'm moving forward. If the road bends hard, I bend with it too. I was never made to stay stuck in the blue. Hands up to the dawn, I'm coming through. No fear, no chains, just the line I choose. Open sky tonight,
I'm running to my dreams. Open sky tonight,
nothing's as it seems. I'm free, I'm free. I'm free. Watch me rise again. Open sky tonight, I'm moving forward. Oh, oh, oh.
Oh, oh, oh. Oh, oh, oh. Open sky tonight, I'm moving forward.
